summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgendaHub operational scheduling platform. Fixed critical datetime timezone bug in backend. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing shows all requested features working correctly including login, appointment creation with new fields, time slots loading (critical bug fixed), supervisor pending assignments, and assignment workflow.

fixed_by_tester.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes on line 331

minor.issue: Old appointment data in DB missing new required fields (first_name, last_name, protocol_number, has_chat, reserved_at) causes 520 errors when fetching
minor.impact: Console errors on page load but UI still works

passed_tests: Login with televendas user (tele1@agenda.com / password123) - PASSED
Login with supervisor user (supervisor2@agenda.com / password123) - PASSED
Login with agente user (agente1@agenda.com / password123) - PASSED
Modal de Novo Agendamento opens correctly - PASSED
CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Time slots loaded in dropdown (18 slots available) - PASSED
New form fields present: Nome (first_name), Sobrenome (last_name) - PASSED
New form fields present: Número do Protocolo, Protocolos Adicionais - PASSED
Multiple file upload area present with drag-and-drop support - PASSED
Toggle 'Cliente tem chat' visible and functional - PASSED
Supervisor can see pending appointments list - PASSED
Supervisor can see agent dropdown with all agents - PASSED
Supervisor can assign appointment to agent - PASSED
Assignment success toast message shown - PASSED
Assigned appointment removed from pending list - PASSED
action_items: Clean up old appointment data in MongoDB that's missing new required fields (first_name, last_name, protocol_number, has_chat, reserved_at) to eliminate 520 errors
critical_code_review_comments: Datetime handling: Consider using pytz or proper timezone handling consistently throughout the codebase
Database migration: Old data in DB needs migration script to add default values for new required fields
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed timezone comparison bug on line 329
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple TEST_ prefixed appointments during testing which were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working. Backend datetime bug was fixed by adding timezone info. Old appointment data in MongoDB from before the schema change (missing first_name, last_name, etc) causes 520 errors but doesn't break functionality. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_appointment_flow.py

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Appointment creation was returning 500/520 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Line 329 in server.py: datetime.fromisoformat() creates offset-naive datetime, but it was being compared with offset-aware datetime (now = datetime.now(timezone.utc))
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: POST /api/appointments with any valid appointment data
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 15 backend tests pass, frontend appointment creation works
